message:
Add mouse hover detection for amino acid display

Implement real-time mouse tracking that shows detailed amino acid
information when hovering over the sequence grid in amino acid view.

State Management (packages/state/src/store.ts):
- Add HoveredAminoAcid interface:
  * letter: Single-letter amino acid code
  * name: Full name (e.g., "Methionine")
  * threeCode: Three-letter code (e.g., "Met")
  * property: Biochemical property (hydrophobic, polar, acidic, basic, special)
  * position: 1-indexed position in the translated sequence
- Add mouseX, mouseY state fields for tracking cursor position
- Add hoveredAminoAcid state field (nullable)
- Add setMousePosition and setHoveredAminoAcid actions

Hover Info Component (packages/tui/src/components/AminoAcidHoverInfo.tsx):
- Displays in the upper right corner of the screen
- Only visible when in amino acid view mode AND hovering over valid AA
- Shows position, single letter (with theme-appropriate background color),
  three-letter code, full name, and biochemical property
- Uses the current theme's amino acid color palette for consistent styling
- Wrapped in rounded border for visual distinction

The feature enables users to quickly identify amino acids by moving
their mouse over the sequence, seeing the full name and properties
without needing to memorize the single-letter codes. This is especially
useful for education and when exploring unfamiliar sequences.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
